keyword.title: Keyword (Financial Service)
keyword.description: The specific financial service (e.g., 'accounting firm', 'auditor', 'tax consultant').

location.title: Location (Optional Region)
location.description: Singapore Region (e.g., 'CBD', 'Raffles Place'). Leave blank to search all of SG.

maxLeads.title: Maximum Leads
maxLeads.description: Maximum number of SG accounting leads to extract.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Apify Residential Proxy (Singapore targeted) is highly required.
